title: LastLocation
description: Sends player to where they were in a world when using Multiverse portals or /mvtp
body:
The LastLocation plugin automatically saves each player’s last position before they leave the server — and when they rejoin, they’ll respawn exactly where they left off. Perfect for survival, RPG, or roleplay servers where players should continue their adventure right where they stopped.

 Features

 Saves player’s last position on logout

 Teleports player back to that position on join

 Supports multiple worlds

 Lightweight and lag-free

 Works with Essentials, Multiverse, and most teleport systems

 Commands

/lastlocation reload – Reloads the plugin configuration

Permissions

lastlocation.reload – Allows reloading of the plugin

Use Case

No more players spawning in hubs every time they rejoin! Keep immersion and exploration seamless with LastLocation.
